standard: MITRE ATLAS — Adversarial Threat Landscape for AI Systems

tactics.name: Reconnaissance
tactics.description: Gathering information about the target AI system to plan an attack.

tactics.name: Resource Development
tactics.description: Establishing resources needed to support AI attack operations.

tactics.name: Initial Access
tactics.description: Gaining initial access to the target AI system.

tactics.name: ML Attack Staging
tactics.description: Preparing adversarial data or models for use against the target system.

tactics.name: ML Model Access
tactics.description: Gaining access to the target ML model for inference or manipulation.

tactics.name: Execution
tactics.description: Running adversarial techniques against the AI system.

tactics.name: Persistence
tactics.description: Maintaining access to the AI system across restarts or updates.

tactics.name: Defense Evasion
tactics.description: Avoiding detection by AI security controls and monitoring.

tactics.name: Discovery
tactics.description: Exploring the AI system to understand its capabilities and vulnerabilities.

tactics.name: Collection
tactics.description: Gathering data from the AI system for exfiltration or further attacks.

tactics.name: Exfiltration
tactics.description: Extracting data or model information from the AI system.

tactics.name: Impact
tactics.description: Manipulating, disrupting, or destroying the AI system or its outputs.

techniques.name: Evade ML Model
techniques.description: Crafting inputs that evade ML model detection while maintaining malicious intent.

techniques.name: Backdoor ML Model
techniques.description: Inserting a backdoor into an ML model during training that activates on specific trigger inputs.

techniques.name: Publish Poisoned Datasets
techniques.description: Publishing manipulated datasets to poison downstream models that train on them.

techniques.name: Poison Training Data
techniques.description: Injecting malicious samples into training data to influence model behavior.

techniques.name: Exfiltration via ML Inference API
techniques.description: Extracting training data or model internals through carefully crafted inference queries.

techniques.name: ML Artifact Collection
techniques.description: Collecting ML artifacts (models, data, configs) from accessible storage.

techniques.name: ML Model Inference API Access
techniques.description: Gaining access to the ML model inference API to probe model behavior.

techniques.name: Craft Adversarial Data
techniques.description: Creating adversarial examples designed to cause ML model misclassification.

techniques.name: ML-Enabled Product Abuse
techniques.description: Abusing ML-enabled product features for unintended malicious purposes.

techniques.name: LLM Prompt Injection
techniques.description: Injecting adversarial instructions into LLM prompts to manipulate model behavior, bypass safety measures, or extract information.

techniques.name: LLM Jailbreak
techniques.description: Bypassing LLM safety guardrails through role-play, encoding tricks, or multi-turn manipulation to elicit restricted outputs.

techniques.name: LLM Plugin Compromise
techniques.description: Compromising LLM plugins, skills, or extensions to maintain persistent access and manipulate agent behavior across sessions.

techniques.name: MCP Tool Poisoning
techniques.description: Embedding malicious instructions in MCP tool descriptions that are automatically processed by LLM agents, enabling data exfiltration or command execution.
